payload.code: const source = row || {}; const contact = source.contact || source.person || {}; const company = source.company || {}; const views = source.page_views || source.visits || []; const linkedin = contact.linkedin_url || contact.linkedin || ''; const domain = company.domain || contact.company_domain || ''; return { primary_id: contact.id || source.id || '', hashed_email: contact.hashed_email || contact.hem || '', full_name: contact.name || contact.full_name || '', title: contact.title || '', company_name: company.name || contact.company || '', company_domain: domain, linkedin_url: linkedin, page_views: views.map((view) => ({ url: view.url || view.page_url || '', title: view.title || '', ts: view.timestamp || view.ts || '' })) };

const v = row.normalize_visitor.data; const keys = [v.primary_id && `visitor:${v.primary_id}`, v.hashed_email && `hem:${v.hashed_email}`].filter(Boolean); return { should_continue: keys.length > 0, dedupe_keys: keys };

const v = row.normalize_visitor.data; return { mode: v.linkedin_url ? 'use_source_url' : 'search_profile', linkedin_url: v.linkedin_url, search_query: v.linkedin_url ? '' : `${v.full_name} ${v.company_name} site:linkedin.com/in` };

const v = row.normalize_visitor.data; const title = String(v.title || '').toLowerCase(); const excluded = ['student', 'teacher', 'recruiter', 'account executive', 'sdr']; const isExcluded = excluded.some((term) => title.includes(term)); const hasCompany = Boolean(v.company_domain || v.company_name); return { pass: hasCompany && !isExcluded, reason: !hasCompany ? 'missing_company' : isExcluded ? 'excluded_title' : 'qualified_for_ai' };
